nasb.text: While the whole assembly worshiped, the singers also sang and the trumpets sounded; all this continued until the burnt offering was finished.

esv.text: The whole assembly worshiped, and the singers sang, and the trumpeters sounded. All this continued until the burnt offering was finished.

cnv.text: 全體會眾都叩拜，歌唱的歌唱，吹號的吹號，直到燔祭都獻完了。

ccb.text: 全体会众伴着歌声和号角声俯伏敬拜，直到献完燔祭。
